name: 40 MG Desogestrel And Ethinylestradiol Tablets USP
about: 40 MG Desogestrel And Ethinylestradiol Tablets USP is a general medicine used as a contraceptive. It contains 40mg of Desogestrel and 30mcg of Ethinylestradiol. The tablets are solid and should be taken as per the suggestion of a healthcare professional. This medicine is manufactured in India and should be stored in a dry place.

faq.q: What is 40 MG Desogestrel And Ethinylestradiol Tablets USP used for?
faq.a: It is a contraceptive used to prevent pregnancy.

faq.q: How should I take this medicine?
faq.a: You should take it as per the suggestion of a healthcare professional.

faq.q: What is the dosage of 40 MG Desogestrel And Ethinylestradiol Tablets USP?
faq.a: The dosage should be determined by a healthcare professional.

faq.q: What are the precautions to be taken while using this medicine?
faq.a: You should not take this medicine if you are pregnant, have liver disease, or have a history of blood clots. You should also inform your healthcare professional if you are taking any other medications.
It is safe to use if taken as per the suggestion of a healthcare professional and all precautions are taken.
